_comment: Field migration config for migrate_custom_fields.py. Copy this file, fill in your values, and pass it with --config yourfile.json

fields._comment: NUMBER field — copied directly from source to destination
fields.name: Story point actual

fields._comment: PEOPLE field — accountIds resolved via user_mapping.csv. Unmapped users appended to description.
fields.name: Collaborators

fields._comment: ADF field — no matching field in Workspace B, so content is appended to the issue description under a heading.
fields.name: Deliverables

fields._comment: TEXT field — plain text, copied directly (single-line or paragraph stored as plain string, not ADF).
fields.name: My Text Field

fields._comment: SELECT field — single select option, e.g. a dropdown. Value is copied by name.
fields.name: My Dropdown Field

fields._comment: DATE field — plain date string (YYYY-MM-DD), copied directly.
fields.name: My Date Field

fields._comment: URL field — plain string, copied directly.
fields.name: My URL Field

fields._comment: ADF field — rich text (Paragraph type). Requires a matching field in Workspace B. If no matching field exists, use adf_append instead.
fields.name: My Rich Text Field
